headline: UnitedHealth Group (UNH) Tops Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
summary: UnitedHealth (UNH) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +11.92% and +2.07%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
